name: Rarraba Hemorrhage (Ajin I-IV)
description: Rarraba zubar jini na ATLS ta kiyasin asarar jini da amsawar jiki.
instructions: Yi ƙididdige asarar jini kuma daidaita alamun ilimin lissafi zuwa aji. Gaggawar jiyya yana ƙaruwa tare da aji.

scoring.treatment: Kula, ruwan PO idan zai iya
Ruwan IV + samfuran jini, sarrafa zubar jini nan da nan
Gyaran zubar jini na gaggawa na gaggawa -- barazanar rayuwa

pediatric.note: Yara suna rama tsawon lokaci kafin a yanke hukunci. Class III/IV na iya kasancewa tare da BP na kusa-na al'ada har sai an rugujewa kwatsam. Amincewa tachycardia da yanayin tunani akan BP.

obstetric.note: Marasa lafiya masu ciki suna da 40-50% ƙara yawan adadin jini. Zai iya jure wa babban hasara kafin nuna alamun. Ciwon ciki na iya zuwa gaban alamun uwa.
